specific_location: Sedgwick County road 59 between roads 28 and 30
description: Bill: slender and pointed, mostly pale especially at the base. Face: rather plain with the appearance of an eyering. The eye was dark and large giving the bird a “big eyed” look. Crown: brown and streaked Back: brown, streaked with a scaly appearance. Underparts: white with a faint buffy wash and a necklace of streaks on the upper breast Tail: short, dark in the center noticeably edged with white Legs: pinkBehaviors: When the bird flew it climbed quite high and then dropped like a stone into the grass.Call: Not heardPlumage: adult
